question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. sleep. Which statement is most consistent with the data?

options.A: People with the highest screen time clearly sleep the most, as shown by the largest, darkest points near the top of the chart.
options.B: On average, more daily screen time is associated with fewer hours of sleep.
options.C: Screen time has no discernible relationship with sleep duration.
options.D: Most people with very low screen time sleep less than 5 hours.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
